name: GT-jordan-identity
source: refs/hos/joa-m.md:825 — HOS eq (2.18), the exact ambient Jordan identity (weak associativity of the special Jordan product): VERBATIM "$$a \circ (b \circ a^2) = (a \circ b) \circ a^2. \tag{2.18}$$". With commutativity (GT-jordan-product) and renaming this gives the symmetric form (a^2∘b)∘a = a^2∘(b∘a) used in the cancellation step.
